voice_observations.caption_text:
Las galletas de esta semana están super ricas! 🍪🧂🌊 Sep 1–6👇

🥜 CHOCOLATE PEANUT BUTTER SANDWICH COOKIE FT. OREO® X REESE’S (NEW)
A creamy peanut butter filling studded with OREO® cookie pieces and chopped REESE’S Peanut Butter Cups, sandwiched between two rich cookies made with OREO® cookie pieces.

🍓 CHOCOLATE COVERED STRAWBERRY COOKIE
A chocolate cookies & cream cookie smothered with fresh strawberry cream cheese frosting and a drizzle of semi-sweet chocolate.

🎪 SUGAR COOKIE FT. MOTHER’S® CIRCUS ANIMAL®

A rainbow sprinkles cookie smothered with melty white drops then crowned with a Mother’s® Original Circus Animal® Cookie and a splash of rainbow sprinkles.

🍦 BISCOFF® ICE CREAM COOKIE
A smooth and delicious brown sugar cookie topped with buttercream made with Biscoff® cookie butter and crumbly cookie pieces.

🟠 CARAMEL PUMPKIN CAKE COOKIE

A fluffy pumpkin cookie, topped with a swirl of smooth caramel cream cheese frosting and a light sprinkling of pumpkin cookie crumbs.

🧈 KENTUCKY BUTTER CAKE COOKIE
A warm yellow butter cake cookie smothered with a melt-in-your-mouth buttery glaze and topped with a sprinkle of powdered sugar.

🍪 SEMI-SWEET CHOCOLATE CHUNK COOKIE
Chocolate chip, but make it chunky—a delicious cookie filled with irresistible semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.

You can now enjoy a Semi Sweet 4-Pack for $9.99! Warm, gooey, and baked fresh daily. 🍪
voice_observations.hook_text: Las galletas de esta semana están super ricas!
